name: Tween-20 (Polysorbate 20)
striking_fact: Even 0.1% Tween-20 foams aggressively if dispensed with air — always dispense along the tube wall with no air gap.

sds_facts.storage: Store at room temperature. Avoid prolonged contact with polystyrene containers.

bench_knowledge: Dispense slowly along the tube wall with the tip touching the side — this prevents air entrainment and foam formation.
Never blow out the last drop with a full air blowout: the air bubble causes visible foam. Touch-off on the wall instead.
Tween-20 adsorbs onto polystyrene over time; use polypropylene tubes for long-term storage of Tween-containing buffers.
Pre-wet the tip before aspirating from the stock bottle to prevent a sticky film on the tip exterior causing trailing drops.
